name: avalanche-mcp
description: Unified MCP server for Avalanche docs, CLI/RPC/ACP lookup, blockchain & P-Chain lookups, indexed on-chain data (Glacier + ClickHouse), build-plan runbooks, and Builder Console guidance.

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search body-level chunks across Avalanche documentation, academy courses, integrations, and blog posts. Returns source citations and matching excerpts.

tools.name: docs_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a specific documentation page as markdown

tools.name: docs_list_sections
tools.description: List available documentation sections and their page counts

tools.name: cli_lookup_command
tools.description: Look up Avalanche CLI, Platform CLI, and tmpnet command guidance in the docs. Returns cited command references and task docs.

tools.name: rpc_lookup_method
tools.description: Look up Avalanche RPC methods and API guides across C-Chain, P-Chain, X-Chain, Subnet-EVM, and node RPC docs.

tools.name: acp_lookup
tools.description: Look up Avalanche Community Proposals (ACPs) by number, title, or topic. When a number is provided the structured ACP record is returned (title, status, track, authors, cross-references).

tools.name: acp_list
tools.description: List Avalanche Community Proposals with structured fields, optionally filtered by status (Activated, Implementable, Proposed, Stale, Withdrawn) or track (Standards, Best Practices, Meta, Subnet).

tools.name: avalanche_docs_search
tools.description: Compatibility alias for docs_search. Prefer docs_search for new clients.

tools.name: avalanche_docs_fetch
tools.description: Compatibility alias for docs_fetch. Prefer docs_fetch for new clients.

tools.name: avalanche_docs_list_sections
tools.description: Compatibility alias for docs_list_sections. Prefer docs_list_sections for new clients.

tools.name: blockchain_get_native_balance
tools.description: Get the native AVAX balance of an address on C-Chain

tools.name: blockchain_get_contract_info
tools.description: Check if an address is a contract and get its ERC20 name/symbol if applicable

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_transaction
tools.description: Look up a transaction by hash on Avalanche (C-Chain, P-Chain, or X-Chain). Supports 0x format (C-Chain) and CB58 format (P/X-Chain).

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_address
tools.description: Look up an address — balance, contract info. Use when users paste an 0x address.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_subnet
tools.description: Look up a Subnet / L1 by its ID — validators, chains, and configuration.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_chain
tools.description: Look up a blockchain by its ID — name, VM type, and subnet.

tools.name: blockchain_lookup_validator
tools.description: Look up a validator by node ID — stake, uptime, delegation info.

tools.name: platform_get_height
tools.description: Get the current P-Chain block height

tools.name: platform_get_block
tools.description: Get a P-Chain block by its block ID

tools.name: platform_get_block_by_height
tools.description: Get a P-Chain block by its height

tools.name: platform_get_blockchains
tools.description: Get all blockchains that exist on the P-Chain (paginated; use limit/offset)

tools.name: platform_get_subnets
tools.description: Get information about subnets on the P-Chain

tools.name: platform_get_current_validators
tools.description: Get the current validators of a subnet (paginated; use limit/offset)

tools.name: platform_get_pending_validators
tools.description: Get the pending validators of a subnet (paginated; use limit/offset)

tools.name: platform_get_staking_asset_id
tools.description: Get the asset ID of the token used for staking on a subnet

tools.name: platform_get_min_stake
tools.description: Get the minimum staking amounts for validators and delegators on a subnet

tools.name: platform_get_total_stake
tools.description: Get the total amount staked on a subnet

tools.name: platform_get_balance
tools.description: Get the AVAX balance of one or more P-Chain addresses

tools.name: platform_get_utxos
tools.description: Get UTXOs that reference a given set of P-Chain addresses

tools.name: platform_get_tx
tools.description: Get a P-Chain transaction by its transaction ID

tools.name: platform_get_tx_status
tools.description: Get the status of a P-Chain transaction

tools.name: platform_get_current_supply
tools.description: Get the current total supply of AVAX on a subnet

tools.name: platform_get_validators_at
tools.description: Get the validators and their weights of a subnet at a given P-Chain height

tools.name: info_get_node_version
tools.description: Get the version of the node, including the database version, git commit, and API compatibility info.

tools.name: info_get_network_id
tools.description: Get the numeric ID of the Avalanche network this node is participating in.

tools.name: info_get_network_name
tools.description: Get the human-readable name of the Avalanche network this node is participating in.

tools.name: info_get_blockchain_id
tools.description: Get the CB58-encoded blockchain ID for a given blockchain alias (e.g., "X", "P", "C").

tools.name: info_is_bootstrapped
tools.description: Check whether a given chain has finished bootstrapping on the node.

tools.name: info_get_tx_fee
tools.description: Get the current transaction fees for the network, returned in both nAVAX and AVAX.

tools.name: info_peers
tools.description: Get a list of peers this node is connected to. Optionally filter by specific NodeIDs.

tools.name: info_acps
tools.description: Get information about Avalanche Community Proposals (ACPs), including their status and vote counts.

tools.name: onchain_lookup
tools.description: Resolve and describe any on-chain identifier in one call: an EVM address (native + token balances, recent txs, and contract metadata + isContract if it is a contract), a contract/token (metadata + deployment + recent transfers), an NFT (collection + tokenId), a tx hash, a subnet ID, a NodeID validator, a P-/X-Chain account (P-…/X-… → P-Chain balance), or a chain name/id. `kind` defaults to auto-detect; network is inferred from P-/X-Chain address prefixes. Backed by Glacier + P-Chain RPC.

tools.name: onchain_activity
tools.description: Time-windowed on-chain activity. scope=chain/address returns the transaction COUNT over the last `hours` plus a recent sample (indexed raw-tx store; auto-falls back to Glacier latest if that store is unavailable). For a token/contract address use scope=token to get its transfers; scope=primary covers P/X-chain (native timestamps). If you pass a value with no scope, it defaults to address.

tools.name: chain_stats
tools.description: On-chain statistics. target=chain: tx count, gas used, fees, active senders, avg gas price over a recent window or as a time-series (from ClickHouse raw_txs). target=contract: per-contract tx/sender/gas totals. target=network: current P-chain validator snapshot (Glacier). No external metrics API.

tools.name: onchain_query
tools.description: Flexible indexed on-chain data via the query gateway (ClickHouse-backed). Pick an op and pass its params (chainId is an allowlisted EVM chain: 43114 C-Chain, 43113 Fuji, + L1s). Ops: chainStatsRecent {chainId, hours<=720}; chainStatsSeries {chainId, days<=365, bucket: hour|day|week|month}; addressActivity {chainId, address, hours<=720, limit<=100}; chainActivity {chainId, hours<=720, limit<=100}; contractStats {chainId, contract, days<=365}; protocolRanking {chainId, contracts[<=25], days<=365, orderBy, dir, limit<=100}; contractGasFlow {chainId, contract, days<=365, limit<=100}; topUnknownContracts {chainId, exclude[<=25], days<=365, limit<=100}; chainGasTotal {chainId, days<=365} or {chainId, fromDate, toDate}.

tools.name: build_plan
tools.description: Generate a step-by-step, copy-pasteable runbook for an Avalanche operation — Builder Console (no-code) path plus the equivalent platform-cli / SDK / interchain-kit commands. Read-only: never signs. operation: create-l1 (launch an L1); use ictt or interchain-kit for any CROSS-CHAIN / interoperability work — bridging tokens, sending cross-chain (ICM / Teleporter / Warp) messages, or connecting your L1 to C-Chain or other L1s (interchain-kit also lets you iterate locally first); validator-manager; staking; transfer.

tools.name: console_link
tools.description: Return a deep-link into a specific Builder Console flow (create-l1, convert-to-l1, validator-manager, ictt, faucet, multisig, staking, transfers, interchain-kit-local). For faucet on mainnet, returns a note that there is no mainnet faucet.

tools.name: console_flow
tools.description: Builder Console flow knowledge. Call with NO `flow` to list every flow (summaries + deep-links); call with a `flow` key to explain it (ordered steps, equivalent CLI, whether it signs transactions, deep-link). Flows: create-l1, convert-to-l1, validator-manager, ictt, faucet, multisig, staking, transfers, interchain-kit-local.
